archive_data.question_text: As per the Union Budget 2020-21, TDS at the rate of ______ is levied on e-commerce transactions.

explanation.english: Section 194-O was introduced in the Union Budget 2020-21, which mandates a TDS of 1% on e-commerce transactions.
explanation.tanglish: 2020-21 Union Budget la Section 194-O introduce pannathu, e-commerce transaction kalukku 1% TDS apply aagum.

archive_data.question_text: 'Akela' is a fictional character in the children's story book ______.

explanation.english: Akela is the leader of the wolf pack in Rudyard Kipling's classic 'The Jungle Book'.
explanation.tanglish: Akela endra siluvai Rudyard Kipling ezhuthiya 'The Jungle Book' il varum. Ithil Akela nari kottaiyin thalaivar.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years was the Family Courts Act enacted?

explanation.english: The Family Courts Act was enacted in 1984 to promote conciliation in and secure speedy settlement of disputes relating to marriage and family affairs.
explanation.tanglish: Family Courts Act 1984 am ekkiappattathu. Ithu thirumanam matrum kudumba ubaththukalukku dheevaaga theerpu kandupidipathukaga nyayasthanangalai amaikum.

archive_data.question_text: The ______ in Punjab is held to commemorate the warriors who laid down their lives in the battle between Guru Gobind Singh and the Mughals.

explanation.english: Maghi Mela is held in January to commemorate the forty Muktas (liberated ones) who sacrificed their lives in the Battle of Muktsar against the Mughals.
explanation.tanglish: Maghi Mela (Thai maatham) Punjab il nadakkum. Ithu Guru Gobind Singh matrum Moghal senaiyodu nadantha Muktsar yuthathil uyirozhintha 40 veerargalai ninaivil nirvakkum.

archive_data.question_text: The Rohtas Fort is located in present day ______.

explanation.english: Rohtas Fort is located near Jhelum in Punjab, Pakistan. It was built during the reign of Sher Shah Suri.
explanation.tanglish: Rohtas Fort ippothu Pakistan ulla Jhelum (Punjab) il ullathu. Ithu Sher Shah Suri kaalathil kattappattathu.

archive_data.question_text: By which Constitutional Amendment Act, the voting age of Indian citizens has been reduced from 21 years to 18 years?

explanation.english: The 61st Constitutional Amendment Act of 1988 lowered the voting age from 21 to 18 years by amending Article 326.
explanation.tanglish: 61st Constitutional Amendment Act 1988 mathappottu, Article 326 la matham seithu mathathai 21 irundhu 18 ku kuraiththathu.

archive_data.question_text: The Census of India 2011 was the ______ national census after Independence.

explanation.english: The 2011 Census was the 7th census after Independence. Previous censuses were held in 1951, 1961, 1971, 1981, 1991, and 2001.
explanation.tanglish: 2011 ana madha census swathanthiram adaintha piragu nadathappatta 7-am census. Munnaadi 1951, 1961, 1971, 1981, 1991, matrum 2001 il nadandhathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who was the head coach of the Mumbai Indians IPL cricket team in 2019?

explanation.english: Mahela Jayawardene served as the head coach of Mumbai Indians during the 2019 IPL season.
explanation.tanglish: Mahela Jayawardene 2019 il Mumbai Indians IPL team in thala coach aaga irundhar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is INCORRECT?

options.text: Proteins help build and repair tissues in the human body.
Extra fat in the human body is stored under the skin.
Deficiency of iodine in the human body causes anaemia.
The human body needs minerals in small quantities.

explanation.english: Iodine deficiency causes goitre (enlargement of thyroid gland), not anaemia. Anaemia is caused by deficiency of iron.
explanation.tanglish: Iodine kuraivu moolam goitre (thyroid gland perumal) varum. Anemiauku karutham iron kuraivu.

archive_data.question_text: A football stadium named after Bhaichung Bhutia has been built near his birthplace in ______.

explanation.english: Bhaichung Bhutia, the former Indian football captain, was born in Sikkim. A stadium named after him was built in Namchi, Sikkim.
explanation.tanglish: Bhaichung Bhutia India football team mudhala captain. Avar Sikkim il pirandhavar. Avargal peril oru football stadium Sikkim ulla Namchi vil amaikappattullathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following organisations/agencies does NOT operate a 'Payment Bank' in India as of August 2020?

explanation.english: Wipro does not operate a Payment Bank. Fino, India Post, and Jio Payments Bank are approved Payment Banks in India.
explanation.tanglish: Wipro Payment Bank operate seiyavillai. Fino, India Post matrum Jio Payment Bank India vil operate seigirathu.
